headline: Guy Wears Same 'Going Out' Shirt For 47 Consecutive Nights Out, Nobody Notices
summary: The shirt has developed its own ecosystem and a faint odor of 'questionable decisions.'
fullBody: Tyler Repeat has worn the same black button-down to every social event for the past 3 months. 'It's my lucky shirt,' Repeat explained. 'Also, I own 5 identical ones.' Friends insist they 'never noticed' until he pointed it out. The shirt has survived multiple spills, a minor fire, and an incident involving a margarita and a ceiling fan. Tyler plans to retire it after 'one more night out' — his 48th.
